name: Sarah Beauty
intro: Soft glam, polished skin work and elevated bridal beauty designed for modern women, editorials and destination events.
bio: Sarah Beauty is a Paris-based makeup artist known for luminous complexions, sculpted softness and an editorial eye. She creates beauty looks that photograph beautifully in natural light and remain timeless on campaigns, weddings and luxury events. Her approach balances precision, skin-first artistry and a calm client experience from prep to final touch-ups.

services.title: Bridal Signature
services.description: Luxury bridal makeup with trial, skin preparation guidance and an on-site beauty experience.

services.title: Editorial Beauty
services.description: Refined beauty direction for lookbooks, campaigns, beauty shoots and fashion content.

services.title: Red Carpet & Events
services.description: High-impact yet elegant makeup designed to last under flash photography and long event schedules.

videos.title: Bridal glow reel
videos.description: Soft bridal skin, elegant detail shots and natural-light finish work.

videos.title: Luxury prep sequence
videos.description: Skin preparation and finishing details for refined premium bookings.

videos.title: Editorial beauty motion
videos.description: A polished motion edit for bridal editorials and soft glam campaigns.

testimonials.name: Camille Laurent
testimonials.text: Sarah created the most elegant version of me. The makeup looked flawless in person, in photos and lasted from morning preparations to the final dance.

testimonials.name: Nina Morel
testimonials.text: She brings a calm luxury energy on set and translates a visual brief into polished, camera-ready beauty every time.

testimonials.name: Lola Martin
testimonials.text: Her skin work is exceptional. The result is premium, modern and never overdone.

name: Lea Atelier
intro: Beauty direction for fashion brands, polished skin stories and refined makeup looks with modern French elegance.
bio: Lea Atelier works across fashion campaigns, creative shoots and premium private clients. Her signature is a clean complexion, nuanced color placement and a strong sense of image composition. She collaborates closely with photographers, stylists and producers to deliver beauty looks that feel elevated, current and commercially credible.

hero.secondaryAlt: Beauty campaign portrait with luminous makeup

services.title: Campaign Beauty
services.description: Premium beauty execution for campaigns, digital launches and brand storytelling shoots.

services.title: Lookbook & E-commerce
services.description: Clean commercial makeup that keeps skin alive while supporting styling, casting and brand tone.

services.title: Talent Grooming
services.description: Camera-ready beauty and on-set touch-ups for founders, presenters and public appearances.

videos.title: Beauty close-up edit
videos.description: Movement-led content focused on texture, finish and premium beauty detail.

testimonials.name: Marine Duvet
testimonials.text: Lea understands image instantly. Her beauty choices always support the campaign and elevate the whole frame.

testimonials.name: Jules Perrin
testimonials.text: She is fast, precise and extremely tasteful. Skin always looks expensive and alive.

testimonials.name: Eva Roche
testimonials.text: From briefing to set etiquette, everything feels premium and effortless.

name: Maya Signature
tagline: Makeup Artist | Runway, Beauty Film & VIP Events
intro: A cinematic beauty approach blending runway polish, luxury skin finishes and movement-led content for modern premium brands.
bio: Maya Signature develops makeup looks for beauty film, runway content and high-end events where motion matters as much as the still image. Her work is known for dimensional skin, elegant structure and a sensual editorial finish that remains clear and believable across video, backstage and campaign assets.

services.title: Beauty Film Makeup
services.description: Makeup designed for motion, close-ups and premium brand storytelling across reels and campaign video.

services.title: Runway & Backstage
services.description: Structured looks that translate across quick changes, backstage pace and live capture moments.

services.title: VIP Event Beauty
services.description: High-performance luxury makeup for galas, launches and public-facing appearances.

videos.title: Backstage beauty film
videos.description: Runway-inspired preparation and touch-up moments captured for premium beauty motion.

videos.title: Luxury event motion
videos.description: Elegant movement and skin texture for event-driven social content.

videos.title: Editorial skin story
videos.description: A close-up beauty sequence highlighting finish, dimension and editorial detail.

testimonials.name: Sofia Bianchi
testimonials.text: Maya has a real video sensibility. Her makeup keeps depth, texture and sophistication even in close moving shots.

testimonials.name: Clara Denis
testimonials.text: Reliable, discreet and visually sharp. She brings high-end calm to demanding schedules.

testimonials.name: Theo Martin
testimonials.text: She understands beauty under motion and light better than most. That is a major advantage on set.
